notes: Could mean either good or lots, depends on the situation
Placed infront of a word, means not, so mmm ho -> not good
Can be used to either me yes, or you are (e.g. I am boy)
Similar to mmm, however would mean you don't have, e.g. useless -> don't have use
Used at the end of a sentence to indicate a the sentence is a question

english: Used at the end of a sentence as a way to like soften the statement just made

notes: Represents the person the speaker is referring to
Same sound as buy, context determines which
